narrative:
Salem 1 (Oak Harbor) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 623 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
